# Eagle Ridge Advisory

> Cybersecurity compliance consulting for small businesses and private equity portfolio companies. CMMC, SOC 2, ISO 27001, and FedRAMP implementation, due diligence, and compliance roadmaps.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://eagleridge.io/): Services overview, compliance frameworks, and contact form
- [About](https://eagleridge.io/about.html): Expertise, client types, and consulting approach
- [Privacy Policy](https://eagleridge.io/privacy.html): Data handling and analytics disclosure

## Services

- **Cybersecurity Due Diligence**: Technical assessment and risk evaluation for portfolio companies — gap identification, remediation cost quantification, and implementation roadmaps aligned with deal timelines.
- **Compliance Implementation**: End-to-end support for ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type 2, CMMC, and FedRAMP certification — documentation, controls implementation, and audit preparation.
- **Go-to-Market Strategy**: Business development and market analysis for technology companies targeting government and enterprise markets.

## Compliance Frameworks

ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type 2, CMMC, FedRAMP, NIST 800-53, GDPR

## Who We Serve

- Small business CEOs needing CMMC/SOC 2 compliance to win government and enterprise contracts
- Private equity and venture capital firms conducting technical due diligence
- Portfolio companies preparing for compliance certifications
- Technology startups targeting government markets

## Contact

- Email: contact@eagleridge.io
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/eagle-ridge-advisory/
- Contact form: https://eagleridge.io/#contact-form
